title: Create a yellow cube button widget with icon (Flutter)

input.description:
# Task Metadata: task 4

## Task ID
task 4

## Action
Create a yellow cube button widget with icon (Flutter)

## Stack
Flutter

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: False

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Pipeline
Architect → Developer → Tester (Designer skipped)

## Summary
Create `test/yellow_cube_button.dart` with `YellowCubeButton` StatelessWidget. 80×80 yellow square with a centered white star icon (Icons.star, size: 32). Prints "Yellow pressed" on tap.

## Key Files
- **Create**: `test/yellow_cube_button.dart`
- **Reference**: `test/blue_cube_button.dart` (centered child pattern)

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Yellow Cube Button Widget with Icon

## Task
Create a Flutter `YellowCubeButton` StatelessWidget in `test/yellow_cube_button.dart`.

## Reference
- `test/blue_cube_button.dart` — centered child inside Container pattern

## File to Create
`test/yellow_cube_button.dart`

## Requirements
- Widget class: `YellowCubeButton` (StatelessWidget)
- Dimensions: 80×80
- Appearance: solid yellow square via `BoxDecoration(color: Colors.yellow)`
- Centered `Icons.star` icon, color: Color
